page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A cost-sensitive online learning method for peptide identification.

Post-database search is a key procedure in peptide identification with tandem mass spectrometry (MS MS) strategies for refining peptide-spectrum matches (PSMs) generated by database search engines. Although many statistical and machine learning-based methods have been developed to improve the accuracy of peptide identification, the challenge remains on large-scale datasets and datasets with a distribution of unbalanced PSMs.
